query:
SELECT
    b.id AS button_id,
    b.name AS button_name,
    d.slave_id,
    s.name AS slave_name,
    b.rfir_command_id AS command_id,
    b.rfir_remote_id AS remote_id,
    d.name AS device_name,
    r.name AS remote_name
FROM
    rfir_buttons AS b
LEFT JOIN
    rfir_commands AS c ON b.rfir_command_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN
    rfir_devices AS d ON c.rfir_device_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN
    rfir_remotes AS r ON b.rfir_remote_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN
    slaves AS s ON d.slave_id = s.id;

query:
SELECT
   day,
   SUM(value) / 1000 AS total_consumption_liters  -- Realiza a soma e depois divide por 1000
FROM 
    consumption_realtime
      
   WHERE
        timestamp BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP(1740798000)
            AND TO_TIMESTAMP(1743476400)  -- Intervalo de tempo

GROUP BY
   day
ORDER BY
   day;

SELECT
   day,
   SUM(value * delta_t_hours) / 1000 AS total_consumption_kwh
FROM (
   SELECT
       time_bucket('1 day', timestamp) AS day,
       value,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (timestamp - LAG(timestamp) OVER (PARTITION BY slave_id ORDER BY timestamp))) / 3600 AS delta_t_hours
   FROM
       consumption_realtime
   WHERE
  timestamp BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
       AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000) 
) AS subquery
GROUP BY
   day
ORDER BY
   day;

SELECT
   day,
   sum(value)/1000
   MAX(Value)/1000
   MIN(Value)/1000
   AVG(Value)/1000
FROM 

    consumption_realtime
 WHERE
  timestamp BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.start_ts }}::bigint / 1000)
       AND TO_TIMESTAMP({{ msg.req.params.end_ts }}::bigint / 1000) 

GROUP BY
   day
ORDER BY
   day;

    avg_value,
    TO_CHAR(period, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"Z"') AS period
FROM (
    SELECT
        slave_id,
        AVG(value) AS avg_value,
        time_bucket('15 minutes', timestamp) AS period
    FROM consumption_realtime
    WHERE
        slave_id IN ({{msg.payload.id}})
        AND timestamp BETWEEN '{{msg.payload.start}}' AND '{{msg.payload.end}}'
    GROUP BY
        slave_id,
        period
) bucketed
ORDER BY period DESC
